decision.reason: treatment beat control by 180.0 point(s) with no hard constraint failures

provenBehavior: The deterministic harness runs the same fixture with semantic evidence disabled and enabled.
The control run exposes no semantic-neighbor links and produces no finding.
The treatment run exposes semantic-neighbor links and produces a traced Refactoring Finding.
Treatment fixtures can run fix and revalidate through the normal CLI while rejecting test mutation.
Constraint fixtures run sealed behavior invariants before measuring future-change cost.
Future-change probes measure whether treatment reduces touch points versus control.
Future-change probes define the change scenario, current cost, target cost, and cost dimensions before scoring easier change.
The run records hard constraint failures separately from quality metrics.
unprovenModelBackedRoi: Live model-backed ROI remains out of scope for this deterministic command.
nextInputs: Expand the sealed constraint corpus and add optional model-backed repeated samples before claiming live-provider ROI.

results.name: Semantic evidence review ROI
results.description: Control/treatment ROI fixture proving semantic evidence promotes a sibling formatter refactoring candidate without producing the finding when semantic evidence is disabled.

constraint.description: Changing formatter money display rules requires edits in checkout and invoice formatter slices.

expectedTransformation.description: Extract duplicated money formatting into one shared formatter helper.

futureChangeProbe.name: change money display prefix
futureChangeProbe.description: A representative future change should update both checkout and invoice money output with fewer touch points after the shared formatter exists.

scenario.scenario: Change the money display prefix for every formatter that renders invoice totals.
scenario.whyThisMeasuresEasier: The same conceptual rule change should cross fewer formatter slices after the refactor because the money-formatting decision has one home.
easierWhen: treatment touches fewer files for the same conceptual money-formatting change
treatment localizes the change to the shared money formatter
